_meta: Anti-mock policy: titles and descriptions marked [PLACEHOLDER] are real-format seed events carried from the prototype. They reflect real event categories the chapter runs; details are pending confirmation from the board. event_date values are representative forward dates. Replace [PLACEHOLDER] items with confirmed data before migrating to production. Columns conform to the events table DDL in docs/data-contract.md §4.
